steps.title: Locate the intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept is the point where the graph crosses the $y$-axis. At that point, the $x$-coordinate is $0$.

steps.title: Read the coordinate
steps.content: The graph shows the $y$-intercept at $(0,40)$, so the requested $y$-coordinate is $40$. The answer is 40.
